text: What is your favourite colour and why do you like it?
Can you describe a painting or drawing you have made?
What type of music do you enjoy listening to?
If you could be in any film or play, which would you choose and why?
How would you describe what art means to you?
Tell me about a famous artist or musician you know about.
What colours would you use to paint a sunny day and why?
Can you describe the sounds you can hear right now as if they were music?
How would you perform a character who is frightened? Show me.
Tell me about your favourite song and what it makes you feel.
If you could design your bedroom wall, what art would you put on it?
How would you describe the difference between warm and cool colours?
Can you tell me the story of a painting you have seen?
What instrument would you most like to learn and why?
How would you mime eating a delicious bowl of soup?
Tell me about a craft you have made or would like to make.
How would you describe what a musical beat is?
Can you explain what a portrait is and describe one you know?
What would you paint if you could paint anything in the world?
How would you perform a character who is very excited?
Tell me what you know about any famous artwork.
How would you describe what abstract art is?
Can you explain why artists use shading?
Tell me about the colours you can see around you right now.
How would you describe the mood of a piece of music you know?
Can you explain what a collage is and how it is made?
Tell me about a time when art or music made you feel something strongly.
How would you describe what a still life painting shows?
What would your dream gallery look like? Describe it.
Can you explain what symmetry means in art?
Tell me about a film or play you have seen that you enjoyed.
How would you explain what rhythm means in music?
Can you describe what Van Gogh's The Starry Night looks like?
Tell me how you would make a collage about your favourite place.
How would you perform a character who is very tired?
Can you explain the difference between painting and drawing?
Tell me about a favourite book illustration and why you like it.
How would you describe what texture means in art?
Can you explain what a landscape painting is?
Tell me about a piece of music that makes you want to dance.
How would you describe the feeling of creating something new?
Can you explain what improvisation in drama means?
Tell me what you think Impressionism is.
How would you mime a rainstorm using only your body?
Can you describe your favourite art tool or material?
Tell me about a building you think is beautiful and why.
How would you explain what a sound effect is in drama?
Can you describe what you imagine when you hear classical music?
Tell me about a tradition in art from a different culture you know about.
How would you explain what graphic design is?
Can you perform a freeze frame showing the moment a goal is scored?
Tell me about a colour that makes you feel calm and why.
How would you describe what a mosaic is?
Can you explain what tempo means in music?
Tell me what you know about the Mona Lisa.
How would you describe the process of making a piece of clay pottery?
Can you explain what typography is?
Tell me about something you created that you are proud of.
How would you mime building a sandcastle on a windy beach?
Can you explain what complementary colours are?
Tell me about a musical instrument you have tried to play.
How would you describe what a conductor does?
Can you explain what pointillism is?
Tell me about the difference between a comedy and a tragedy in drama.
How would you describe what animation is?
Can you explain how primary colours make secondary colours?
Tell me what you know about street art.
How would you describe the feeling of listening to live music?
Can you mime someone who has just received a wonderful surprise?
Tell me about an art form from another country you find interesting.
How would you describe what a storyboard is?
Can you explain why you think art is important?
Tell me about a drama game or exercise you enjoy.
How would you describe what a musical harmony is?
Can you explain what the Renaissance was?
Tell me what a body of work means for an artist.
How would you describe what surrealism means?
Can you explain what a loom is used for?
Tell me about a colour combination you find beautiful.
How would you describe what an art critique involves?
Can you explain what digital art is?
Tell me how you would design a poster for your favourite film.
How would you describe what body language shows in drama?
Can you explain what chiaroscuro means in art?
Tell me about a famous building and what makes it special.
How would you describe the process of printmaking?
Can you explain what makes a good stage performance?
Tell me about a piece of art you have seen in real life.
How would you describe the difference between major and minor scales?
Can you explain what origami is?
Tell me what you know about Aboriginal dot painting.
How would you describe what colour psychology means?
Can you explain what an ensemble is in music?
Tell me about what you would include in an art sketchbook.
How would you describe what a motif is in art or music?
Can you explain what expressionism in art is?
Tell me about an art therapy activity you would enjoy.
How would you describe what makes art meaningful?
Can you explain what a musical rest is?
If you could be any artist or musician, who would you choose and why?
